t.div: You were the only member, so the workspace was deleted when you left.
Could not change status for this workspace (invalid state or permission).
Could not delete this workspace. It may have linked records blocking removal.

div.class: card itlingo-portal-filter-card shadow-sm border-0 rounded-3 mb-4
col-12 col-lg-12 d-flex flex-wrap gap-2 mt-2 mt-lg-0

t.div: No workspaces match your filters, or you are not a member of any workspace yet.

button.title: Delete workspace
button.onclick: return confirm('Delete this workspace? This cannot be undone.');

div.class: card itlingo-portal-filter-card shadow-sm border-0 rounded-3 mb-4

t.div: No public workspaces match your search.

span.t-attf-class: badge rounded-pill #{'text-bg-secondary' if document.status == 'draft' else 'text-bg-warning' if document.status == 'in_review' else 'text-bg-success' if document.status == 'approved' else 'text-bg-primary' if document.status == 'published' else 'text-bg-dark'}

nav.class: itlingo-org-hub__sidebar nav flex-column rounded-3 shadow-sm bg-white p-2

a.t-if: not workspace_hub_public and user_role and user_role.role == 'ws_manager'

t.div: Enter an email address to invite.
This user already has a role in the workspace.
The workspace must keep at least one workspace manager.

form.onsubmit: return confirm('Leave this workspace? You will lose access.');
return confirm('Remove this member from the workspace?');

div.class: d-flex flex-wrap justify-content-between align-items-center gap-2 mb-3

t.p: No documents linked to this workspace yet.

div.class: rounded-circle bg-primary bg-opacity-10 d-flex align-items-center justify-content-center me-3

div.p: Edit ASL and RSL specification files for this workspace using the ITOI online IDE.
Opens in a new tab. Your session is linked to the workspace. You have write access. You have read-only access.

t.div: You need to be an organization manager to create a workspace.

div.label: Public workspace (all users can view documents and specifications)
Public workspace (all users can view documents and specifications)

input.name: planned_cost
input.t-att-value: form.get('planned_cost') if form.get('planned_cost') is not None else ''

input.name: current_cost
input.t-att-value: form.get('current_cost') if form.get('current_cost') is not None else ''

input.name: planned_cost
input.t-att-value: form.get('planned_cost') if form.get('planned_cost') is not None else ''

input.name: current_cost
input.t-att-value: form.get('current_cost') if form.get('current_cost') is not None else ''

div.p: You are the last Workspace Manager of this workspace. Pick another member to promote to Workspace Manager before you leave.

button.onclick: return confirm('Promote the selected member and leave the workspace?');
